OK: (clojure.core/seq (clojure.core/concat (clojure.core/list (quote clojure.core/fn?)) (clojure.core/list (quote user/x))))

OK: (quote clojure.core/fn?)

OK: (clojure.core/seq (clojure.core/concat (clojure.core/list (quote var)) (clojure.core/list (quote user/x))))

OK: (clojure.core/seq (clojure.core/concat (clojure.core/list (quote var)) (clojure.core/list (quote user/x))))

OK: :kw

IN: `:ns/kw
OK: :ns/kw

OK: 42

OK: 2.5

OK: "str"

IN: `\c
OK: \c

OK: (quote nil)

IN: `(a b c)
OK: (clojure.core/seq (clojure.core/concat (clojure.core/list (quote user/a)) (clojure.core/list (quote user/b)) (clojure.core/list (quote user/c))))

IN: `()
OK: (clojure.core/list)

IN: `(a (b (c d)))
OK: (clojure.core/seq (clojure.core/concat (clojure.core/list (quote user/a)) (clojure.core/list (clojure.core/seq (clojure.core/concat (clojure.core/list (quote user/b)) (clojure.core/list (clojure.core/seq (clojure.core/concat (clojure.core/list (quote user/c)) (clojure.core/list (quote user/d))))))))))

IN: ~x
OK: (clojure.core/unquote x)

IN: `~x
OK: x

IN: `~(f x)
OK: (f x)

IN: `(a ~b)
OK: (clojure.core/seq (clojure.core/concat (clojure.core/list (quote user/a)) (clojure.core/list b)))

IN: `(a ~(b c))
OK: (clojure.core/seq (clojure.core/concat (clojure.core/list (quote user/a)) (clojure.core/list (b c))))

IN: `(a ~@xs)
OK: (clojure.core/seq (clojure.core/concat (clojure.core/list (quote user/a)) xs))

IN: `(a ~@xs b)
OK: (clojure.core/seq (clojure.core/concat (clojure.core/list (quote user/a)) xs (clojure.core/list (quote user/b))))

IN: `(~@xs)
OK: (clojure.core/seq (clojure.core/concat xs))

IN: `~'x
OK: (quote x)

IN: `(list ~'x)
OK: (clojure.core/seq (clojure.core/concat (clojure.core/list (quote clojure.core/list)) (clojure.core/list (quote x))))

IN: `[]
OK: (clojure.core/apply clojure.core/vector (clojure.core/seq (clojure.core/concat)))

IN: `[a b]
OK: (clojure.core/apply clojure.core/vector (clojure.core/seq (clojure.core/concat (clojure.core/list (quote user/a)) (clojure.core/list (quote user/b)))))

IN: `[1 [2 [3]]]
OK: (clojure.core/apply clojure.core/vector (clojure.core/seq (clojure.core/concat (clojure.core/list 1) (clojure.core/list (clojure.core/apply clojure.core/vector (clojure.core/seq (clojure.core/concat (clojure.core/list 2) (clojure.core/list (clojure.core/apply clojure.core/vector (clojure.core/seq (clojure.core/concat (clojure.core/list 3))))))))))))

IN: `[~@xs]
OK: (clojure.core/apply clojure.core/vector (clojure.core/seq (clojure.core/concat xs)))

IN: `{}
OK: (clojure.core/apply clojure.core/hash-map (clojure.core/seq (clojure.core/concat)))

IN: `{:k v}
OK: (clojure.core/apply clojure.core/hash-map (clojure.core/seq (clojure.core/concat (clojure.core/list :k) (clojure.core/list (quote user/v)))))

IN: `{:a {:b c}}
OK: (clojure.core/apply clojure.core/hash-map (clojure.core/seq (clojure.core/concat (clojure.core/list :a) (clojure.core/list (clojure.core/apply clojure.core/hash-map (clojure.core/seq (clojure.core/concat (clojure.core/list :b) (clojure.core/list (quote user/c)))))))))

IN: `{~k ~v}
OK: (clojure.core/apply clojure.core/hash-map (clojure.core/seq (clojure.core/concat (clojure.core/list k) (clojure.core/list v))))

IN: `#{}
OK: (clojure.core/apply clojure.core/hash-set (clojure.core/seq (clojure.core/concat)))

IN: `#{a}
OK: (clojure.core/apply clojure.core/hash-set (clojure.core/seq (clojure.core/concat (clojure.core/list (quote user/a)))))

IN: `#{~x}
OK: (clojure.core/apply clojure.core/hash-set (clojure.core/seq (clojure.core/concat (clojure.core/list x))))

OK: (clojure.core/seq (clojure.core/concat (clojure.core/list (quote x__1__auto__)) (clojure.core/list (quote y__2__auto__))))

IN: `(let [x# 1] x#)

IN: [`x# `x#]
OK: [(quote x__1__auto__) (quote x__2__auto__)]

IN: `(when ~test ~@body)
OK: (clojure.core/seq (clojure.core/concat (clojure.core/list (quote clojure.core/when)) (clojure.core/list test) body))

IN: `(a `(b ~c))
OK: (clojure.core/seq (clojure.core/concat (clojure.core/list (quote user/a)) (clojure.core/list (clojure.core/seq (clojure.core/concat (clojure.core/list (quote clojure.core/seq)) (clojure.core/list (clojure.core/seq (clojure.core/concat (clojure.core/list (quote clojure.core/concat)) (clojure.core/list (clojure.core/seq (clojure.core/concat (clojure.core/list (quote clojure.core/list)) (clojure.core/list (clojure.core/seq (clojure.core/concat (clojure.core/list (quote quote)) (clojure.core/list (quote user/b)))))))) (clojure.core/list (clojure.core/seq (clojure.core/concat (clojure.core/list (quote clojure.core/list)) (clojure.core/list (quote user/c)))))))))))))

IN: `(a `(b ~~c))
OK: (clojure.core/seq (clojure.core/concat (clojure.core/list (quote user/a)) (clojure.core/list (clojure.core/seq (clojure.core/concat (clojure.core/list (quote clojure.core/seq)) (clojure.core/list (clojure.core/seq (clojure.core/concat (clojure.core/list (quote clojure.core/concat)) (clojure.core/list (clojure.core/seq (clojure.core/concat (clojure.core/list (quote clojure.core/list)) (clojure.core/list (clojure.core/seq (clojure.core/concat (clojure.core/list (quote quote)) (clojure.core/list (quote user/b)))))))) (clojure.core/list (clojure.core/seq (clojure.core/concat (clojure.core/list (quote clojure.core/list)) (clojure.core/list c))))))))))))
